content.text: I see that `AccordionContent` on line 332 also has a blank line (line 335) where `isHidden` was likely removed in a prior pass. In PF v6, `AccordionContent` visibility is controlled by `AccordionItem`'s `isExpanded` prop, so the blank line is just cosmetic. Let me clean it up:
Edited /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/netobserv-web-console/source/web/src/components/drawer/record/record-panel.tsx (5 lines -> 4 lines)
Good. Now let me read the companion test file:

The test file looks fine. It doesn't interact with accordion toggle/expand behavior, doesn't test dropdown/menu/popover content queries, and doesn't use OUIA selectors or check for attributes that would change due to our fixes. The `variant="plain"` on Button is unchanged. No test modifications needed.

Let me verify the final state of the main file is correct:
The file looks correct. Let me also verify the full file is syntactically consistent:

The file looks good — 504 lines (down from 506, due to removing the two blank artifact lines).

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Accordion `isExpanded` migration (Line 329)
**Applied.** Moved `isExpanded={!hidden.includes(toggleId)}` from `AccordionToggle` (where it had been removed in a prior pass, leaving a blank line) to `AccordionItem`. The `AccordionItem` import was already present. Also cleaned up a blank-line artifact on `AccordionContent` where `isHidden` had been removed in a prior pass.

### Fix 2 — Button `variant` type change (Line 461)
**No change needed.** The value `variant="plain"` is valid in both the old type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | ...`) and the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | ... | 'stateful' | ...`). The `"plain"` variant was not removed or renamed — only `"stateful"` was added. No code change required.

### Companion test file
**No change needed.** The test file (`record-panel.spec.tsx`) does not interact with accordion expand/collapse state, does not query dropdown/popover content, and does not use OUIA selectors or attributes affected by the changes.

### Fix 3
Line: 459
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Popover

Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

### Fix 4
Line: 15
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

   15    Popover,
   16    Tab,

Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
